channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Baldur’s Gate 2 Remake In Development – REPORT
item.content:encoded:
Baldur’s Gate 2 is set to be the next classic game to get the remake treatment. According to a report from PC Gamer, Wizards of the Coast is in the process of remaking the 25-year-old RPG.

Joining the project, they say, is Kevin Martens. Martens, if you didn’t know, was the co-lead designer on Baldur’s Gate 2 at BioWare. In addition to Baldur’s Gate 2, Martens worked on Neverwinter Nights and Mass Effect, among other titles, while at BioWare. He then left to join Blizzard in 2009, working as lead content designer for Diablo 3.

In addition to Baldur’s Gate 2, PC Gamer reports that “it’s likely both” of the first two games are being remade. They also say that what they’ve heard suggests both could be in development concurrently.

It’s important to note that nothing regarding a Baldur’s Gate 2 remake has been confirmed. So, as per usual, take the information with a grain of salt until Insider Gaming can confirm the validity or an official announcement is made.

When asked about the claims, a spokesperson for Wizards of the Coast told Insider Gaming that the company doesn’t comment on rumors or speculation.

What do you think of a potential Baldur’s Gate 2 remake? Leave your thoughts on the annual event in the comments below, or join the discussion in the official Insider Gaming Discord.

In other news, read about PlayStation eliminating more than 1,000 shovelware games from its store. And for even more Insider Gaming delivered directly to your inbox, sign up for our newsletter.

Mike has been covering the gaming industry since 2012, and has reported on some of the largest events in the industry while also working as an investigative reporter. Outside of…

More from Mike Straw

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Does Mina the Hollower Have a Physical Edition? Can You Buy a Physical Copy?
item.content:encoded:
Mina the Hollower has been a long time coming after the Shovel Knight series. The spiritual successor has defied all expectations and is one of 2026’s best games. If you’re interested in buying it, let’s go through Mina the Hollower’s physical edition copy details.

Whether you buy physical media to eventually trade it in and save on the cost of games, or you’re a loyal collector, it’s always better to own your game rather than buy a digital license. I’m just spitting facts, and it’s why I do worry about companies seemingly moving toward digital media.

That said, games like Mina the Hollower deserve to have a physical edition you can cherish forever.

Can You Buy a Physical Copy of Mina the Hollower?

At the time of writing, Mina the Hollower doesn’t have a physical edition you can buy, and the game’s launch was only on digital storefronts on PlayStation, Xbox, PC, and Nintendo Switch.

If you check the Mina the Hollower Kickstarter, there might be an element of confusion, which I can explain.

  • More Insider Gaming: Mina The Hollower Review

The initial Kickstarter FAQ said this:

‘The $100 Physical copy tier gets you both a Physical Copy AND Digital Copy as well as all of the rewards in the previous tiers!

If you’re only interested in owning the physical copy of the game, don’t worry! The $100 tier is not the only way to get a physical copy as you’ll be able to get the game at a normal price at launch. The tiers are ways for us to reward you for backing the game’s development and supporting us. If this was just a point of sale transaction then yeah, $100 would be way too high!’

Now, this suggests you could get a physical copy at launch if you didn’t back the Kickstarter. However, this section was last updated on ‘Thu, February 3, 2022. 8:27 PM UTC +00:00.’

Plans clearly changed, but there are still definitely plans in the works.

Will Mina the Hollower Get a Physical Release?

Yes, a Mina the Hollower physical release is definitely happening, and it will be ‘later down the road.’

Like Hades 2 and many other games, you will be able to buy a physical edition after the initial digital launch, but developer and publisher Yacht Club Games haven’t been able to narrow things down just yet.

  • More Insider Gaming: Mina the Hollower is a New Indie GOTY Contender

When discussing a physical version, here’s what the team had to say:

‘Yes, but it will be later down the road.’

Once it happens, we’ll be sure to give you a clearer picture of when you can secure a proper Mina the Hollower game case to display—maybe with a tempting special edition?

Have you bought and played Mina the Hollower yet? Does it deserve the GOTY praise and hype? Will you buy a physical copy once it’s available? Let us know via the Insider Gaming Discord.

Read about Yacht Club Games’ fate depending on Mina the Hollower’s success for more related content.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Tier 2 Counter-Strike Tournament Organizer Collapses into Bankruptcy
item.content:encoded:
Tier 2 Counter-Strike Tournament Organizer, New Breed Agency, has announced the immediate cancellation of the Parken circuit after the TO initiated bankruptcy proceedings.

The announcement brings to an end the Parken Challenger Championships, a set of highly ambitious Tier 2/3 Copenhagen LANs which were intended to culminate in an event at Parken Stadium, the home of F.C. Copenhagen.

The news comes ironically only a day before the start of the IEM Cologne 2026 Major, with several attending teams owing, in part, their qualification to the Tier 2 LANs.

Ambitious Parken Challenger circuit collapses in an instant

The news puts an end to the Parken Circuit, one of the most ambitious projects in the Tier 2/3 space, a circuit which promised over $500,000 of prize pool to teams fighting to climb their way to the Tier 1 scene.

In total, eight Parken Challenger Championships were held of the 16 planned LAN events. Each Challenger Championship event had a prize pool of €10,000 (roughly $11,600 USD).

The winners of the events were then qualified for the year-ending Stadium Master LAN Finals, where eight Open Qualified teams would join them. The Stadium LAN boasted a prize pool of $342,000, a gargantuan sum for a Tier 2 LAN.

In the end, that stadium event will never happen as the tournament organizer collapses under the weight of its debts.

The tournament organizer shared the cancellation of those events, stating, “It is with great regret that we must announce that Parken Challenger Championship Series #9-16, as well as the Parken Stadium Master Finals, have been cancelled and will not take place.

“This follows the decision by New Breed Agency ApS, the operating company behind the Parken Challenger Championship, to initiate bankruptcy proceedings.”

The bankruptcy puts an end to New Breed Agency’s Parken circuit. The eight winners of Parken Challenger Championship events were:

  1. GamerLegion
  2. Betclic Apogee
  3. B8
  4. Aab Esport
  5. Infinite
  6. 100 Thieves
  7. Basement Boys
  8. WOPA Esport

New Breed Agency breaks under financial burdens

The TO stated that “Over the past several months, management, shareholders, and partners have worked extensively to secure additional funding and explore alternative solutions that could allow the company and its projects to continue operating. Unfortunately, despite these efforts, a viable solution could not be reached.”

As for the nature of that debt, Esplay and Barstool Production gave the public at least some hint at the scope of money owed when they formally withdrew from their partnership with New Breed on Saturday.

Esplay announced its withdrawal from the partnership and stated, “Esplay AB is not, and has never been, responsible for prize money payouts, player or team compensation, ticket refunds, entry refunds, or any other refunds connected to the Parken Challenger Championship.”

“All questions regarding prize money, payments, refunds, event status, or participant compensation should be directed to the project owner, New Breed Agency ApS”

As part of their statement, Parken Challenger Championships’ social media shared, “We are also aware that there are outstanding obligations connected to completed events and ongoing operations.

“Following the initiation of bankruptcy proceedings, all creditor matters and outstanding claims will be handled in accordance with applicable bankruptcy legislation and under the supervision of the appointed bankruptcy estate.”

Let us know your thoughts on the state of Tier 2 CS on Insider Gaming’s Discord!
For other news, see the details of Insider Gaming’s Showcase!

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Nightshift Tower Defense Codes (June 2026)
item.content:encoded:
Use these active Roblox Nightshift Tower Defense monthly redeem codes to get your hands on free rewards like free tokens, souls and more.

Inspired by Five Nights at Freddy’s, Nightshift Tower Defense is a popular Roblox experience that drops players into the middle of a high-octane tower defense circuit. Players are required to place their first defensive units upon launch, and from there, progress through the game to get the best animatronic defenders available. With strategic tower placement and upgrade systems that let you enhance your units with special powers.

Having been released about 9 months ago, Nightshift Tower Defense has gradually gained traction over the course of its existence and now boasts a fairly dedicated player base with over 800,000 visits and a 91% positive rating. Although simply participating in the various night challenges the game offers is enough for players to keep upgrading their towers, using redeem codes to get some extra tokens, souls, or special items is never a bad idea.

Active Nightshift Tower Defense Codes

  • 300kvisits: Redeem code for Freebies [Must have 10 Wins to redeem]
  • bear5: Redeem code for Freebies [Must have 10 Wins to redeem]
  • beta: Redeem code for Freebies [Must have 10 Wins to redeem]
  • merryshiftmas: Redeem code for [Must have 10 Wins to redeem]
  • riddleriddling1: Redeem code for [Must have 20 Wins to redeem]
  • thx4playing: Redeem code for Freebies [Must have 10 Wins to redeem]
  • newyears
  • riddleriddling2
  • afk

Expired Nightshift Tower Defense Codes

As of the writing of this article, there are no expired codes, so players can redeem the active codes safely.

How To Redeem Nightshift Tower Defense Codes

Redeeming Nightshift Tower Defense codes is a fairly straightforward matter, and they have made sure that even newer players to the game can navigate to the codes section and claim their rewards without too much fuss. However, the game has one requirement that players must adhere to before using any codes: they must be level 10.

Beyond that, redeeming codes is a rather simple process and here’s how:

  1. Launch Nightshift Tower Defense on Roblox
  2. Click on the Setting gear, located in the bottom left of the screen
  3. Enter or paste a working code into the text box
  4. Press enter to claim the freebie. Keep a close eye on the code’s requirements, as most codes require a certain win condition for players to work.

Where To Get More Nightshift Tower Defense Codes

Nightshift Tower Defense codes are typically released through the game’s community and developer channels, but they don’t appear automatically in-game. The best places to catch them early are the official Nightshift Tower Defense Discord server, which has a dedicated codes channel where all new codes are posted first, and the Phantom Code Collective Roblox group where they announce updates and milestones for this popular FNAF-inspired tower defense game.

Codes often come out around game milestones, special events, and after server downtimes, but if you’re only checking sporadically, you’ll very easily miss them because no alert system tells players when a code drops—or when it stops working. Because of this, the easiest strategy is to save this guide in your browser and check back instead of trying to monitor every source yourself.

This page is refreshed as soon as fresh codes go live, and any codes that have expired are taken out quickly so you always see only the ones that still work.

Having fun using codes in Roblox games? Then check out the latest codes for 99 Nights in the Forest, Type Soul, and Azure Latch. Also, check out the Insider Gaming Discord server.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/roblox-nightshift-tower-defense-codes/

item.title: ROG XBOX Ally X20 Finally Adds an OLED Model to the Handheld Lineup
item.content:encoded:
ASUS has unveiled the new ROG XBOX Ally X20 to celebrate the 20th anniversary of ROG at this year’s Computex expo. This stunning handheld iterates on the XBOX Ally range introduced last year and evolves marvellously, with ASUS (finally) equipping the X20 with an OLED panel.

The X20 is exclusive to the anniversary edition, which comes bundled with a pair of all-new ROG XREAL R1 Edition 20 AR glasses. It’s a high-tech, high-spec bundle that’ll have gamers on the go dizzy with capabilities.

XBOX Ally X20 Features Revealed

At Computex 2026, ASUS revealed the ROG XBOX Ally X20 handheld, designed to pair perfectly with fancy gold-accented XREAL R1 Edition AR glasses. This will allow those who like to game on the go to do so from a perspective they might have never experienced before.

But how does the XBOX Ally X20 differ from the standard XBOX Ally X?

Well, the X20 comes with a sumptuous ROG Nebula HDR display featuring a 7.4-inch OLED panel, something never seen before in ASUS’ handheld lineup. The unit also comes with TMR joysticks, which allow users to enjoy everything from racers to first-person shooters with surprising accuracy

The X20’s screen size has been maximized over previous models, with ASUS cutting out a 60% smaller bezel around the top of the display for ‘a more immersive gaming experience.’

What’s most impressive about the X20 is the base shell. This unit boasts a translucent black design that allows you to glimpse the inner workings of this beautiful handheld, which has been touched up with gold details for that extra visual pop.

ASUS invites users to pair the X20 with the ROG XREAL R1 Edition AR glasses, which can be connected to the X20 via USB-C to produce a 171-inch virtual screen across a 240Hz display with ultra-low latency. That’s some incredible gaming on the go, if you ask me.

Under the hood, the X20 boasts similar specs to the XBOX Ally X:

  • 24 GB of LPDDR5X RAM
  • 1 TB PCIe 4.0 NVMe storage
  • AMD Ryzen AI Z2 Extreme processor

When I reviewed the XBOX Ally X, I dubbed it the ultimate gaming handheld, but the X20 might take that crown. Stay tuned, because at the time of writing, neither a release date nor a price was confirmed for this device.

Will you be wishlisting the ASUS ROG XBOX Ally X20 anywhere? Let us know on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that Steam Deck prices are skyrocketing

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: 1win Acquires Tundra Esports Dota 2 Roster
item.content:encoded:
Tundra Esports has announced the departure of its Dota 2 roster, with the full roster moving to the 1win Dota 2 division, effectively withdrawing Tundra from the space.

The roster will still contest The International 2026, now under the banner of 1win Esports, as team invites are assigned to the roster’s core rather than the organization.

The new 1win Esports roster is:

  • Ivan ‘Pure’ Moskalenko
  • Bozhidar ‘bzm’ Bogdanov
  • Neta ’33’ Shapira
  • Matthew ‘Ari’ Walker
  • Matthew ‘Whitemon’ Filemon

Tundra become latest org to leave Dota 2

Following rumours of Tundra Esports’ departure from the Dota 2 space, Tundra has confirmed that they have now stopped competing in the space after the departure of the roster.

Tundra has become one of the most recognizable and successful organizations in the Dota 2 space since its entry in 2021, with the roster most-famously lifting the Aegis at The International 2022.

The roster also won Tier 1 events at ESL Fall 2021, FISSURE Playground 1, and every single BLAST Slam between BLAST Slam II and BLAST Slam V, a remarkable four-event run.

So far in 2026, the roster has won two events: DreamLeague Season 28, remarkably taking down an inform Aurora, and ESL One Birmingham 2026, where Ari lifted the ESL One trophy in front of his home crowd in the UK.

Despite their dominant record at BLAST events, the roster failed to reach the playoffs of BLAST Slam VII in their last event representing Tundra.

Their 9th-10th place finish in the online portion of the event seems less surprising following the news of the behind-the-scenes changes that the players were facing in switching organizations.

The organization becomes the latest org to depart the competitive Dota 2 space after Heroic left the scene, citing “unsustainable” finances as the reason for their departure. The roster was later signed by LGD Gaming.

Tundra’s statement reads:

“After an unforgettable and successful 6 years in Dota 2 with the legendary team, Tundra Esports is preparing to begin a new chapter.

From lifting the Aegis at The International 2022 to championship victories at FISSURE Universe: Episode 4, BLAST Slam III, BLAST Slam IV, BLAST Slam V, DreamLeague Season 28, and ESL One Birmingham 2026, this journey has been nothing short of extraordinary.

Our team brought passion, brilliance, joy, and excitement to millions of fans around the world, creating memories that will forever be part of Tundra’s history.

Today, we say goodbye and thank you to our legendary players:

33 bzm Pure Ari Whitemon

And to our coach, MoonMeander.

Your dedication, talent, and belief made this era truly special. You gave everything to the game, to the team, and to the fans, and your achievements will always remain a proud part of Tundra Esports.

We also want to give a special thank you to our incredible partner, WINLINE. Without your support, belief, and commitment, this journey would not have been possible.

To all our players, coach, sponsors, staff and fans. We want to say a huge thank you for being part of this unforgettable chapter”

Will the roster return to success under the 1win banner? Let us know on Insider Gaming’s Discord!
For other news, see the details of Insider Gaming’s Showcase!

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Tarkov Console Edition ‘Hint’ Found on Icebreaker Map
item.content:encoded:
Escape from Tarkov’s console edition has long been a point of discussion amongst the extraction community. For months, Battlestate Games has openly admitted that the console version is in production, but we don’t at all know to what extent or in what capacity. The leading theory is that it’ll eventually be some kind of ‘Tarkov lite’ version.

When I spoke to Battlestate’s Nikita Buyanov last year, he suggested that they want to retain as much of the core Tarkov feel as possible with a console edition. Now, eagle-eyed players have uncovered another hint to the console edition of Escape from Tarkov on the new Icebreaker map, but it comes with a unique retro twist.

Escape from Tarkov Console Retro Console Reference

Fans probing the new Icebreaker map have uncovered a retro console reference to Escape from Tarkov coming to other platforms. It echoes a joke Nikita Buyanov made a year ago, stating that Escape from Tarkov will come to Game Boy before coming to modern consoles.

In one room on Icebreaker, players have found a replication of a classic PlayStation console alongside a copy of an NES, and in both, there’s a version of Escape from Tarkov waiting to be played.

This is far from being the first time that console replications have popped up in Escape from Tarkov, of course. When you level up your hideout’s rest space far enough, you get a fake PlayStation 4 console with a copy of ‘Call of Call’ sitting beside it. There are also fake copies of Escape from Tarkov on disc littered across the game’s multiple maps.

In October, after the Tokyo Game Show, Nikita was captured on video pledging to deliver a console version of Escape from Tarkov, but again, no prospective release windows were given. In a TarkovTV episode just a few weeks ago, he explained that they’re looking for a partner to help port the game to console, so it’s safe to assume they’re relatively early on in that journey.

Do you want to see Escape from Tarkov come to console? Let us know on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that Fable’s release has been delayed

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill
